signals: OpenAI confirma el uso de infraestructura NVIDIA Blackwell (GB200) para el entrenamiento de GPT-5.2 y GPT-5.3 Codex.
Reino Unido activa Isambard-AI, supercomputador de 21 exaflops, reforzando su capacidad de computación soberana.
La litografía EUV avanza con nuevos estudios en fotorresistores de óxido metálico para mejorar la precisión en chips.
Anthropic lanza el modo autónomo de Claude Code, delegando decisiones de aprobación a clasificadores internos de IA.
Google DeepMind escala la generación musical con Lyria 3 Pro, enfocándose en la estructura de larga duración.
risks: Inestabilidad química en procesos de litografía MOR puede causar variaciones críticas de dimensión en chips avanzados.
Dependencia extrema del ecosistema de modelos de vanguardia (OpenAI) en la disponibilidad física de chips Blackwell.
Riesgos de ejecución no supervisada en agentes de programación autónomos que operan sin permisos explícitos.
watch: Eficacia real de GPT-5.3 Codex como modelo agente capaz de mejorar su propio desarrollo de software.
Resultados de la iniciativa UK-LLM en la preservación de lenguas minoritarias mediante IA soberana.
Integración de las capacidades de razonamiento de Gemini Deep Think en flujos de trabajo científicos reales.

items.title: As AI Grows More Complex, Model Builders Rely on NVIDIA
items.summary: Unveiling what it describes as the most capable model series yet for professional knowledge work, OpenAI launched GPT-5.2 in December. The model was trained and deployed on NVIDIA infrastructure, including NVIDIA Hopper and GB200 NVL72 systems. GPT-5.3 Codex — the first OpenAI agentic coding model to help build itself — was released in February and […]
items.why: OpenAI confirma el uso de sistemas GB200 para sus modelos más avanzados, validando el dominio absoluto de NVIDIA.

items.title: NVIDIA Research Shapes Physical AI
items.summary: AI and graphics research breakthroughs in neural rendering, 3D generation and world simulation power robotics, autonomous vehicles and content creation.
items.why: Investigación en IA física para simulación de mundos y robótica presentada para SIGGRAPH 2025.

items.title: Reaching Across the Isles: UK-LLM Brings AI to UK Languages With NVIDIA Nemotron
items.summary: Celtic languages — including Cornish, Irish, Scottish Gaelic and Welsh — are the U.K.’s oldest living languages. To empower their speakers, the UK-LLM sovereign AI initiative is building an AI model based on NVIDIA Nemotron that can reason in both English and Welsh, a language spoken by about 850,000 people in Wales today. Enabling high-quality […]
items.why: Uso de modelos Nemotron para crear un LLM soberano que soporte lenguas celtas en el Reino Unido.

items.title: Isambard-AI, the UK’s Most Powerful AI Supercomputer, Goes Live
items.summary: The University of Bristol’s Isambard-AI, powered by NVIDIA Grace Hopper Superchips, delivers 21 exaflops of AI performance, making it the fastest system in the U.K. and among the most energy-efficient globally.
items.why: Activación de Isambard-AI, el supercomputador más potente de UK con 21 exaflops de rendimiento.

items.title: Innovation to Impact: How NVIDIA Research Fuels Transformative Work in AI, Graphics and Beyond
items.summary: The roots of many of NVIDIA’s landmark innovations — the foundational technology that powers AI, accelerated computing, real-time ray tracing and seamlessly connected data centers — can be found in the company’s research organization, a global team of around 400 experts in fields including computer architecture, generative AI, graphics and robotics. Established in 2006 and […]
items.why: NVIDIA Research detalla cómo su equipo de expertos fundamenta el desarrollo de centros de datos y ray tracing.

items.title: NVIDIA GauGAN2, a powerful [#AI](https://x.com/hashtag/AI?src=hashtag_click) model that allows anyone to convert simple written phrases like "ocean waves" in...
items.summary: NVIDIA GauGAN2, a powerful [#AI](https://x.com/hashtag/AI?src=hashtag_click) model that allows anyone to convert simple written phrases like "ocean waves" into a photorealistic masterpiece. Learn more about GauGAN2 now: [nvda.ws/3oNitRX](https://t.co/IhNldsaEYV) The media could not be played.
items.why: GauGAN2 permite convertir texto simple en imágenes fotorrealistas mediante redes generativas antagónicas.

items.title: Applications Now Open for $60,000 NVIDIA Graduate Fellowship Awards
items.summary: Bringing together the world’s brightest minds and the latest accelerated computing technology leads to powerful breakthroughs that help tackle some of the biggest research problems. To foster such innovation, the NVIDIA Graduate Fellowship Program provides grants, mentors and technical support to doctoral students doing outstanding research relevant to NVIDIA technologies. The program, in its 25th […]
items.why: Programa de becas para doctorandos enfocado en investigación de computación acelerada.

items.title: NVIDIA Releases New AI Models and Developer Tools to Advance Autonomous Vehicle Ecosystem
items.summary: Autonomous vehicle (AV) stacks are evolving from many distinct models to a unified, end-to-end architecture that executes driving actions directly from sensor data. This transition to using larger models is drastically increasing the demand for high-quality, physically based sensor data for training, testing and validation. To help accelerate the development of next-generation AV architectures, NVIDIA […]
items.why: Transición hacia arquitecturas end-to-end en vehículos autónomos demanda modelos más grandes y datos físicos.

items.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
items.why: Google presenta Lyria 3, su modelo más reciente para generación de música dirigido a desarrolladores.

items.title: Chemical Origins of Environmental Modifications to MOR Lithographic Chemistry
items.summary: In the pursuit of advanced extreme ultraviolet (EUV) lithography for high-NA patterning, metal oxide resists (MORs) offer significant promise but face challenges like critical dimension (CD) variation due to atmospheric interactions. Presented at SPIE Advanced Lithography + Patterning 2025 by Kevin M. Dorney and colleagues… Read More The post Chemical Origins of Environmental Modifications to MOR Lithographic Chemistry appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: Investigación crítica sobre litografía MOR para High-NA EUV busca solucionar variaciones en la fabricación de chips.

items.title: New on the Engineering Blog: How we designed Claude Code auto mode. Many Claude Code users let Claude work without permission prompts. Auto mode is a safer m...
items.summary: New on the Engineering Blog: How we designed Claude Code auto mode. Many Claude Code users let Claude work without permission prompts. Auto mode is a safer middle ground: we built and tested classifiers that make approval decisions instead. Read more:
items.why: Claude Code introduce modo autónomo para realizar tareas de ingeniería sin solicitudes constantes de permiso.

items.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more
items.summary: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.
items.why: Lyria 3 Pro permite crear pistas más largas con conciencia estructural, integrándose en productos de Google.

items.title: From games to biology and beyond: 10 years of AlphaGo’s impact
items.summary: Ten years since AlphaGo, we explore how it is catalyzing scientific discovery and paving a path to AGI.
items.why: Análisis retrospectivo de los 10 años de AlphaGo y su impacto en el camino hacia la AGI.

items.title: Accelerating Mathematical and Scientific Discovery with Gemini Deep Think
items.summary: Research papers point to the growing impact of Deep Think across fields
items.why: Gemini Deep Think demuestra avances significativos en la resolución de problemas científicos y matemáticos complejos.

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.why: Serie de diálogos sobre la intersección entre IA y creatividad humana.
